title: cryptic_pocket_v1 — CRYPTIC-POCKET sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/cryptic_pocket_sim.py. One row per pocket class: the closed/open conformational equilibrium (Boltzmann apo open-state population, opening free energy dg_open), the conformational-selection free-energy ledger dg_bind_obs = dg_bind_open + dg_open, and the cryptic-site viability gate, anchored to conformational free-energy / Boltzmann population statistics. CRYPTIC-POCKET is a SUB-AXIS :> QUANTUM core (AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

pocket.description: Pocket identifier within the deterministic panel.

pocket_class.description: Cryptic-pocket structural class (cryptic_switch_pocket, cryptic_allosteric_pocket, constitutive_open_pocket, etc.).

drug_precedent.description: Own drug precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

pocket_state.description: Classification of the pocket by opening cost and apo open-state population.

temperature_K.description: Temperature used for the Boltzmann populations (K).

dg_open_kcal_per_mol.description: Conformational opening free energy closed->open (kcal/mol). >0 for a cryptic pocket.

dg_bind_open_kcal_per_mol.description: Intrinsic binding free energy to the already-open pocket (kcal/mol, <0 favourable).

dg_bind_obs_kcal_per_mol.description: Apparent (observed) binding free energy = dg_bind_open + dg_open (kcal/mol) — the cryptic-site opening-cost penalty.

apo_open_state_population.description: Boltzmann population of the open (pocket-formed) state in the apo protein, P_open in (0,1).

kd_penalty_factor.description: Apparent Kd penalty factor exp(dg_open/RT) — >=1 for cryptic pockets.

ledger_consistency_rel_err.description: Relative error of the conformational free-energy ledger cross-check; numerical-consistency gate.

rt_kcal_per_mol.description: Thermal energy RT (kcal/mol) at the simulation temperature.

cryptic_popen_threshold.description: Apo open-state population below which a pocket is classified cryptic.

is_cryptic.description: True iff dg_open > 0 and apo open-state population is below the cryptic threshold.

druggable_dg_threshold_kcal_per_mol.description: Apparent binding free energy threshold for cryptic-site binder viability (kcal/mol).

cryptic_binder_viable.description: True iff dg_bind_obs remains at or below the druggability threshold after paying the opening cost.

opening_cost_outpaid.description: True iff the intrinsic binding budget |dg_bind_open| exceeds the opening cost dg_open.
